title: Zoho CRM vs Zoho
description: Compare Zoho CRM vs Zoho in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right crm & sales tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, Zoho CRM emerges as our recommendation for most users with a 4.2/5 rating compared to 4.2/5. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. We recommend evaluating both tools against your requirements.

faqs.question: Which is better, Zoho CRM or Zoho?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, Zoho CRM edges ahead with a 4.2/5 rating. Zoho CRM excels at Comprehensive CRM platform with sales, marketing and service modules., while Zoho is stronger for Comprehensive CRM with AI assistant, multichannel communication, and deep custom.

faqs.question: What are the main differences between Zoho CRM and Zoho?
faqs.answer: Zoho CRM and Zoho differ in pricing ($14-65/mo vs Free–$65/user/mo), target audience, and feature focus. Our comparison table breaks down these differences.

faqs.question: Is Zoho CRM cheaper than Zoho?
faqs.answer: Zoho CRM starts at $14-65/mo while Zoho starts at Free–$65/user/mo. Consider total cost of ownership including implementation and training.

faqs.question: Which tool has better features, Zoho CRM or Zoho?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer strong features for crm & sales. Zoho CRM scores higher overall, but specific feature needs may favor one over the other.

faqs.question: Can I use Zoho CRM and Zoho together?
faqs.answer: Many organizations use both tools for complementary purposes. However, for overlapping use cases, choosing one streamlines workflows.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, Zoho CRM or Zoho?
faqs.answer: Both Zoho CRM and Zoho prioritize user experience. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise and workflow preferences.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Both offer documentation and support tiers. The quality varies by plan level — check our detailed review for support comparisons.

faqs.question: Which crm & sales tool is best for my team size?
faqs.answer: Enterprise features favor Zoho for large teams, while Zoho CRM may be more suitable for smaller teams with its $14-65/mo pricing.
